+## Week 37 / Day 252

+- Cash: $1,656,789. Individual subscribers fell to 80 after 101 cancellations; new subscribers were 0. Enterprise remains at zero seats and no fresh messages.
+- Tier 0 remained safe: usage 188,599 units, no overload, no outage.
+- Week 36 ledger: subscription payments $897, compute -$2,648, operations -$1,600, capacity -$680, lead acquisition -$8.
+- Remaining active book is entirely S2 C: 80 subscribers at avg $304.63.
+- Changes:
+  - Held steady: prices $49/$149/$299, model tiers A1/B2/C4, capacity tier 0, global ops $200/day.
+  - Kept targeted ops/dev empty, development $0, ads $0.
+- Watch next week: whether the final S2 C cohort stabilizes, residual billing cadence, and stale enterprise movement.
